utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items requested in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 appear in the final coverage plan. Now check if each is fully specified with required details: (1) health_coverage: requires physical and mental health insurance with costs. The plan includes 'physical' and 'mental' each with a plan name and cost, so fully specified. (2) property_coverage: requires home/contents insurance with costs. The plan includes 'home_contents' with plan and cost; this satisfies the requirement. Additional 'business_equipment' is extra but fine. (3) travel_coverage: travel insurance with costs. Provided with plan and cost, so specified. (4) additional_services: any enhancement services with costs. Provided with a plan and cost, so specified. (5) total_budget: complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. The plan provides monthly cost only; it lacks an annual cost breakdown, so it is not fully specified according to the requirement.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: We match each plan in the final coverage plan to its exact name in the ground-truth ratings and extract the corresponding numeric rating. The final plan includes: LifeFirst Standard Plan for physical and mental health (both present in primary_health_coverage categories with rating 8 for each), EliteHome Premium Coverage for home contents (rating 10), Technology Protection add-on (rating 10 under property_enhancement_services), EliteTravel Premium Plan for travel (rating 10), and Premium Insurance Membership (rating 10 under general_services).
